chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA No.46 of 2013 M/s Abdullah Computers Versus Collector of Customs Date Order with signature of Judge For order as to non-prosecution of main case as notice not issued to respondent as process fee not yet deposited. Dated: 21.12.2021 None present. -.-.- Twice the matter is fixed for non-prosecution, yet the compliance has not been made. No one is in attendance on behalf of the applicant. There is no intimation either. It appears that the applicant has lost interest in the proceedings. Instant Reference Application is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge
